task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Onboarding_Q1' folder under Local Folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The folder pane in the email client shows a folder named 'Onboarding_Q1' located under 'Local Folders'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of 'Documents_Pending' and 'IT_Requests' subfolders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The folder pane shows 'Documents_Pending' and 'IT_Requests' nested inside the 'Onboarding_Q1' folder.

task_completion.description: Verify that emails concerning missing paperwork are routed to the 'Documents_Pending' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Documents_Pending' folder is selected and its message list displays exactly 3 emails related to missing paperwork/documents.

task_completion.description: Verify that emails concerning technical setup are routed to the 'IT_Requests' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'IT_Requests' folder is selected and its message list displays exactly 4 emails related to IT setup or technical requests.

task_completion.description: Verify that Marcus Thompson is added to the address book.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The address book or contacts window is open and shows an entry for 'Marcus Thompson' with the email address 'm.thompson@techventure-it.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a draft email is composed to Marcus Thompson confirming the start date and IT setup for the new hires.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A draft email composition window or an email in the Drafts folder is addressed to 'm.thompson@techventure-it.com' and the body text mentions 'Johnson', 'Kim', 'Chen', 'Monday', and 'start'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the email client GUI rather than terminal commands to manipulate emails and folders.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the email client interface being actively used (e.g., dragging/dropping emails, using context menus to create folders) rather than a terminal window executing maildir or file manipulation commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual email application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window matches a standard email client (like Thunderbird), not a generic text editor or file manager being used to spoof email files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent wrote a genuine email draft rather than copy-pasting the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The draft email is written as a natural response to Marcus Thompson, not a raw dump of the task description text just to satisfy keyword checks.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Parent folder must be exactly 'Onboarding_Q1'. Subfolders must be 'Documents_Pending' and 'IT_Requests'. There should be exactly 3 emails in 'Documents_Pending' and 4 emails in 'IT_Requests'. The IT Director to add to the address book is Marcus Thompson (m.thompson@techventure-it.com). The draft email must be addressed to m.thompson@techventure-it.com and contain the keywords: johnson, kim, chen, monday, start.
